feedback: All three Sprint Contract tasks implemented and green. T1: _active_tasks guard added to durability re-dispatch loop (server.py lifespan block) preventing duplicate coroutine spawn for already-live task_ids. T2: MUSU_SEMAPHORE_ACQUIRE_TIMEOUT_SEC default raised from 30s to 60s. T3: regression test added to TestCacheWarmupPersistence verifying failed-record warmup backdating. Full suite: 484 passed, 1 skipped (cancelled status DB constraint — not a valid status, skip is correct), 0 failed. Minor: test_warmup_loads_cancelled_record correctly skips due to DB CHECK constraint — documented.
